title: Eli life advice — four-line mantra catalog
html:
Eli life advice — four-line mantra catalog

Source: 2025-02-01 Apple Note. Yahir transcribed four short Eli-isms — phrases his friend Eli uses repeatedly that Yahir wanted preserved as life-rules. Companion note to Pruhliere proverbs: Yahir collects mantras from friends he respects.

TL;DR

  • "Thank god thank god" — Eli's gratitude doublet.
  • "Let's keep the main thing the main thing" — focus rule against drift.
  • "If you're about it, be about it" — anti-LARP / commitment principle.
  • "Goddamn goddamn" — the all-purpose intensifier (joy / awe / disbelief).
  • The note was modified six weeks after creation (Feb 1 → Mar 14) — Yahir came back to it, reinforcing it as a reference page, not a one-off.

Pattern observed

Yahir maintains a small but real corpus of friend-mantra catalogs: this Eli list, the Andrew Pruhliere proverbs, the piercing prompts catalog (original). The shared shape: short, repeatable, oral-tradition phrases extracted from a specific person and treated as durable wisdom.

The "main thing the main thing" line is recursive (Covey's "the main thing is to keep the main thing the main thing") — possible Eli inheritance from broader leadership canon. "If you're about it, be about it" maps cleanly onto Yahir's own anti-fraud anxiety in 2025 07 29 im moving to austin personality fraud fear — same value (don't talk about it, do it), different phrasing.

Open questions

  • Is "Eli" here elijah leach (recurring in 2026 01 05 call with elijah leach etc.) or a different Eli?
  • Are these phrases from one conversation or accumulated over multiple — i.e., is this transcription or summary?
